## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      5 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Feb 24, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Mukul Gupta_, Jul 17, 2026, 1/5: "Overtime this has only got more buggy and laggy. Not what I expected after buying the premium subscription."
            2. _eywu_, Jul 9, 2026, 1/5: "I updated the app, and completely forgot my old account. It asks me to sign up again. When inputting all my information and verifying my email, I continually get an error message that says “Oops! Something went wrong. Please try again.” All that time and money, lost to a broken app."
            3. _Lildvxgkskgd_, Jul 9, 2026, 1/5: "The app keeps crashing after the latest update. It won't even open—as soon as I launch it, it immediately kicks me out. I tried uninstalling and reinstalling, but the issue persists. Please fix this bug!"
